description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure depicted in a dynamic, mid-step pose, suggesting movement or dance. The individual is dressed in a fitted long-sleeve blouse tucked into a short skirt, with sheer tights and high-heeled shoes. The figure's left hand is placed on the hip while the right arm is extended downward, fingers splayed, adding to the sense of motion. The person wears large, round glasses and has voluminous, shoulder-length hair styled with a headband. The overall appearance is stylish and urban, suitable for a city street or sidewalk. The clothing and accessories indicate a fashionable, possibly professional or social context.
description: A stylish adult pedestrian in a dynamic pose, wearing a blouse, short skirt, tights, high heels, and glasses, with voluminous shoulder-length hair. The figure exudes a fashionable, urban vibe.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blouse, skirt, glasses, and expressive hand gesture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the dynamic leg position and profile of the face and hair.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blouse, skirt, and the figure's posture.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the bent knee, arm position, and side profile.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve blouse, short skirt, sheer tights, high-heeled shoes, large glasses
attribute_posture: dynamic mid-step pose with one hand on hip and the other extended
